name: Italy
contextBlurb: Italy's infrastructure and transport portfolio (which covers public housing) is held by Matteo Salvini (Lega), Ministro delle Infrastrutture e dei Trasporti. The Senate is examining several housing-related bills in committee, with informal hearings underway. Real estate sector experts have been heard by the Camera to evaluate the role of institutional investment in social-housing interventions.

legislation.title: Disegno di legge S. 37
legislation.summary: Bill under examination at the Senato della Repubblica in the 19th Legislature, with committee proceedings including informal hearings and amendments related to the building and housing sector.

legislation.title: Disegno di legge S. 565
legislation.summary: Bill under examination at the Senate in the 19th Legislature. Subject to informal hearings and committee amendments. Covers interventions in the building sector and social housing.

keyFigures.name: Matteo Salvini
keyFigures.role: Ministro delle Infrastrutture e dei Trasporti
